announcements.title: 🚨 CodeWizard Registration Update 🚨
announcements.content:
🚨 Attention, Code Wizards! 🚨

We’re absolutely thrilled to have you all onboard! 🎉
800+ registrations already in the bag! 🙌

However, we’ve noticed that many teams still have incomplete registrations. 😬

We need your complete registration ASAP to move forward and shortlist teams quickly! ⚡ Don’t leave it for the last minute—let’s get it done so we don’t face any delays! ⏳

Complete your registration now and get ready to shine! 🌟💪

We can’t wait to see your brilliance! ✨

announcements.title: 0xProfile Retrieval Feature
announcements.content:
🚨 Attention, forgetful legends!

The Tech Team got so overwhelmed with people asking for their 0xProfile (we nearly developed RSI from typing 😅) that we birthed this masterpiece of a feature! 🎉

Now, for all you username amnesia victims 🤦‍♂🤦‍♀, simply head over to:
👉 https://whatismy0xprofile.vercel.app 👈

Remember, this only works for previous participants—new folks, sorry, you're on your own! 🤷‍♂ You're welcome! 🎉✨

announcements.title: Profile Update Tip
announcements.content:
✨ Profile Update Tip

Hey everyone! 🚨 Quick tip: To improve your chances of getting shortlisted, make sure to update your LinkedIn and GitHub profiles on Unstop, along with a killer 'About' section! 💻✨ Let your profile do the talking—shine bright and stand out! 🌟🚀

announcements.title: 0xProfile Requirement
announcements.content:
⚠️ 0xProfile is Mandatory! 🚨

We’ll be using 0x.day’s hackathon management software, and your credentials will be provided according to your 0xProfile. Therefore, it’s essential that every team member has their own 0xProfile! 💼🔑

Don't miss out—set it up now and stay ahead! 💪🚀

announcements.title: Mandatory Task Completion
announcements.content:
Important Notice 🚨

As part of the hackathon requirements, each team member must individually complete the mandatory task using the form linked below. 📋✅

  1. Verified during the shortlisting process. ✅
  2. Failure to complete may affect your team’s eligibility. ❌

🔗 Form Link
